description_long: This is a full-length shovel featuring a long, straight wooden handle with a T-grip at the top, providing a secure hold for two-handed use. The handle is a natural wood color, showing some subtle grain and minor discoloration from use. The blade is a classic round-point design, made of dark metal, and is attached securely to the handle with a metal collar. The blade shows visible signs of wear, including scuff marks and some surface rust, especially near the tip and edges, indicating regular use in soil or gravel. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the handle and blade well-integrated for heavy-duty digging tasks. No visible brand logos or mounting hardware are present on the handle or blade.
description: A well-used shovel with a wooden T-grip handle and a worn, round-point metal blade, showing signs of regular use and minor rust.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the shovel, with the T-grip handle and the rounded metal blade facing forward.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the curvature of the blade, with the T-grip visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle, with the T-grip end clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view emphasizing the blade's profile and the connection between the handle and blade.
attribute_handle_type: T-grip handle, straight, made of wood, with a perpendicular wooden bar at the top for grip.
attribute_blade_type: Round-point blade, metal, with a curved edge and pointed tip, showing wear and some rust.
attribute_wear_pattern: Visible wear and abrasion on the blade, especially at the tip and edges, with some surface rust and discoloration. Minor discoloration on the handle.
